support.title: Support
support.description: If you have any issues or questions about the invitation, you can contact the developer:
support.rightsDescription: You can request the deletion or export of your personal data at any time according to your jurisdiction (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPEDA or POPIA).
support.rightsHint: Your email client will open with a pre-filled template. You can also write to adriancl2001@gmail.com.
support.ccpaText: Wedingo does not sell personal data. The data collected is used exclusively for managing the invitation. If you are a California resident, you have the right to request deletion of your data and not to be discriminated against for exercising your rights.
support.appDescription: Web application for managing wedding invitations.
support.copyright: © {{year}} Adrián Carrasco López. All rights reserved.
support.deleteEmailBody:
Hello,

I request the deletion of my personal data associated with the following invitation:

Guest name:
Invitation token (if known):

Exercise of the right to erasure (GDPR Art. 17 / CCPA / LGPD / POPIA).

Thank you.
support.exportEmailBody:
Hello,

I request the export of my personal data associated with the following invitation:

Guest name:
Invitation token (if known):

Exercise of the right to data portability (GDPR Art. 20).

Thank you.

cookie.title: Cookie consent
cookie.text: Wedingo uses local storage necessary for the invitation to function (saving your session and preferences). We do not use third-party cookies or trackers.

legal.privacyPolicy:
Data controller: Adrián Carrasco López. Contact: adriancl2001@gmail.com. Purpose: wedding invitation management, RSVP and event communication.

Legal basis: consent of the data subject (Art. 6.1.a GDPR). Health data (allergies and food intolerances) is processed with explicit consent (Art. 9.2.a GDPR) to adapt the wedding menu.

Data collected: name, dietary preferences (allergies and intolerances), voluntarily uploaded images, bank details if voluntarily provided.

Recipients: Google LLC (Firebase, Google Cloud Platform) based in the USA. Google has signed the Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) approved by the European Commission (Implementing Decision 2021/914) and has a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) in accordance with Art. 28 GDPR. In addition, Google complies with the Data Privacy Framework (DPF) EU-US, UK-US and Switzerland-US, a certification that guarantees an adequate level of protection for international data transfers.

International transfers: data is stored on Google Cloud servers in the eur3 region (Europe, Frankfurt). When data transfer to the US is necessary, it is covered by the SCC and Google's DPF certification.

Retention period: guest data is retained for up to 12 months after the event date. After this period, it will be automatically deleted. The creator's configuration data is retained while the account is active.

Rights: you may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection by writing to adriancl2001@gmail.com. Guests may request deletion of their data by providing their name and the invitation. We will respond to your request within a maximum of 30 days.

Right to withdraw consent: you may withdraw your consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal.

Right to lodge a complaint: you have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority, in particular in the Member State of your habitual residence, place of work or place of the alleged infringement.

CCPA/CPRA: If you are a California resident, you have the right to know what personal information is collected, the right to request deletion, and the right to opt out of the sale of personal information. Wedingo does not sell personal data.

LGPD (Brazil): If you are in Brazil, you have the rights under the Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD), including confirmation of processing, access, correction, anonymization, blocking, deletion, portability, and revocation of consent. DPO: same data controller. Contact: adriancl2001@gmail.com. Rights under Art. 18 LGPD: confirmation, access, correction, anonymization/blocking/deletion, portability, information about sharing, withdrawal of consent, review of automated decisions, opposition.

PIPEDA (Canada): If you are in Canada, your personal information is handled in accordance with PIPEDA. PIPEDA principles: accountability (Adrián Carrasco López), identifying purposes, consent, limiting collection, limiting use/disclosure/retention, accuracy, safeguards, openness, individual access, challenging compliance. Mandatory breach notification to the OPC.

POPIA (South Africa): If you are in South Africa, you have the rights under the Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA), including access, correction, deletion, and objection to processing. Conditions for cross-border transfers (Section 72 POPIA): data is transferred to Google LLC (USA) which provides an adequate level of protection through SCCs and DPF. The controller ensures the recipient applies processing principles similar to those of POPIA.

Security breach response plan: in the event of a personal data breach, Wedingo will notify the competent supervisory authority within a maximum of 72 hours (GDPR Art. 33). If the breach poses a high risk to the rights and freedoms of data subjects, they will be notified without undue delay (GDPR Art. 34). Notifications will be sent by email to the contact address provided.
legal.termsText:
By using Wedingo you accept these terms. Wedingo is a platform for creating and managing wedding invitations.

Users agree not to use the platform for unlawful purposes or to send offensive content.

Wedingo is not responsible for user-generated content or for how guests use their personal data.

We reserve the right to modify these terms. Changes will be notified through the platform.

For California residents: in the event of a conflict between these terms and the CCPA, the rights granted by the CCPA shall prevail.
legal.legalText:
In compliance with applicable laws, the following information is provided:

Data controller: Adrián Carrasco López
Email: adriancl2001@gmail.com
Website purpose: personalized wedding invitation platform.

This website uses Firebase (Google LLC) as hosting and storage infrastructure, with servers in the European Union.

errors.usernameRequired: Enter a username so you can log in later.
errors.usernameInvalid: Username can only contain letters and numbers.
errors.dateNotValid: The date entered is not valid (e.g. February 30 does not exist).
errors.dateBeforeToday: The wedding date cannot be before today.
errors.yearTooFar: The year cannot be later than {{year}}.
errors.sectionOrderInvalid: The section order is not valid.
errors.hiddenSectionsInvalid: The hidden sections are not valid.
errors.godparentsRequired: If you enter one godparent, both names are required.
errors.coverFirst: The cover must be the first section.
errors.menuRequired: Describe at least one main menu (meat, fish or vegan).
errors.ibanInvalid: The IBAN format is not valid.
errors.musicUrlInvalid: The music link must be a valid URL (https://...).
errors.galleryFormatInvalid: The gallery image format is not valid.
errors.sectionOrderMismatch: The section order has {{actual}} items, but {{expected}} were expected.
errors.messageTooLong: The invitation message cannot exceed 500 characters.
errors.giftsTooLong: The gift information cannot exceed 2000 characters.
errors.transportTooLong: The transport information cannot exceed 2000 characters.
errors.configSaveFailed: Could not save the configuration. If this is your first time, try accessing from the private panel.
errors.deleteConfirm: Delete your entire invitation? All data, photos and confirmations will be erased. This cannot be undone.

compliance.title: Record of processing activities (Art. 30 GDPR)
compliance.updated: Updated: July 2026. This record documents personal data processing activities in Wedingo.
compliance.row1Data: Couple names, date, venue, theme, photos, music, menu, sections
compliance.row2Data: Guest name, attendance (yes/no), menu selection, allergies, health data
compliance.row4Purpose: Control access to the admin panel
compliance.row5Data: Superadmin actions, used tokens, deleted invitations
compliance.internationalText: Data is stored on Google Cloud servers in the eur3 region (Frankfurt, Germany). Google LLC (USA) acts as data processor under a DPA in accordance with Art. 28 GDPR. Transfers to the USA are covered by:
compliance.dpf: Data Privacy Framework (DPF) EU-US, UK-US and Switzerland-US
compliance.measureEncryption: AES-256-GCM encryption of images and sensitive data (PBKDF2)
compliance.measureTls: HTTPS connection (TLS 1.3) across the entire platform
compliance.measureStorage: Minimal local storage with consent only
compliance.measureRetention: Retention policy: 12 months post-event for guest data
compliance.measureSuperadmin: Superadmin protected by Firebase Authentication + hidden route

themeHints.golden: Elegant and bright, with golden accents.
themeHints.forest: Natural and sober with soft greens.
themeHints.rose: Warm and delicate, with pink hues.
themeHints.linen-soft: Light and neutral, with a serene and timeless presence.
themeHints.blush-pearl: Soft and romantic, with pearly pink tones.
themeHints.lavender-mist: Fresh and serene, with lavender and mauve hues.
themeHints.champagne-bubble: Bright and festive, with warm golden sparkles.
themeHints.amber-night: Dark and elegant, with amber and gold highlights.
themeHints.onyx-gold: Deep and sophisticated, with intense gold on dark background.
themeHints.midnight-royal: Very dark blue with intense gold and solemn presence.
themeHints.burgundy-velvet: Warm and enveloping, with red wine and golden sparkles.
themeHints.sapphire-night: Deep blue with silver accents and serene presence.
themeHints.emerald-grove: Deep natural green with golden and elegant hues.
themeHints.plum-twilight: Intense purple with pink and romantic sparkles.
themeHints.rainbow: Celebration of diverse love with rainbow colors.
themeHints.trans: Blue, pink and white in tribute to the trans flag.
themeHints.nonbinary: Yellow, white, purple and black for the non-binary flag.
themeHints.lesbian: Orange, white and pink of the lesbian flag.
themeHints.bi: Pink, purple and blue of the bi flag.
themeHints.pan: Pink, yellow and blue of the pan flag.
themeHints.ace: Black, gray, white and purple of the asexual flag.
